description: Global power grid investment figures. Data centers are a key demand driver cited in BNEF reporting. Used as a 30% weight in the AEAI blended energy index.

series.notes: Baseline year. BloombergNEF reported $470B+, +16% YoY. Second consecutive year of double-digit growth, with data centers explicitly cited as a major demand driver.

update_frequency: Annual (update each year when BNEF publishes new figures)
